_meta.name: planet-in-sign-knowledge
_meta.purpose: Astrology planet-in-sign 矩阵数据层（10行星×12星座=120篇，程式化 generate）
_meta.evidence_tier: 西方占星公开通识（确证）：行星/星座属性源自 Hellenistic/Medieval 占星传统，公开标准化
_meta.caveat: 占星为象征/反思框架非科学；planet-in-sign 组合含义由 AI 基于行星+星座属性组合生成（非逐组合 research）；crystals 按行星代表石（现代配伍）

sun.name: Sun
sun.drives: who you are at your core, your life force and creative self-expression
sun.crystals_note: Sun stones (modern association): citrine for solar vitality, tiger-eye for confident identity

moon.name: Moon
moon.drives: your emotional nature, inner needs, and instinctive reactions
moon.crystals_note: Moon stones: moonstone for emotional flow, selenite for lunar clarity

mercury.name: Mercury
mercury.drives: how you think, speak, learn, and process information
mercury.crystals_note: Mercury stones: sodalite for clear thinking, clear-quartz for mental clarity

venus.name: Venus
venus.drives: what you love, value, and attract; how you relate
venus.crystals_note: Venus stones: rose-quartz for love, rhodonite for relationship harmony

mars.name: Mars
mars.drives: how you assert, act, pursue desire, and handle conflict
mars.crystals_note: Mars stones: red-jasper for grounded action, garnet for drive

jupiter.name: Jupiter
jupiter.drives: where you grow, seek meaning, and find opportunity
jupiter.crystals_note: Jupiter stones: citrine for abundance, lapis for wisdom

saturn.name: Saturn
saturn.drives: where you face discipline, responsibility, and long-term mastery
saturn.crystals_note: Saturn stones: smoky-quartz for grounding discipline, hematite for structure

uranus.name: Uranus
uranus.drives: where you seek change, break rules, and awaken
uranus.crystals_note: Uranus stones: amethyst for awakening, labradorite for transformation

neptune.name: Neptune
neptune.drives: where you dream, dissolve boundaries, and seek the transcendent
neptune.crystals_note: Neptune stones: amethyst for spiritual intuition, moonstone for dreamwork

pluto.name: Pluto
pluto.drives: where you transform, face power and shadow, and regenerate
pluto.crystals_note: Pluto stones: obsidian for shadow work, smoky-quartz for transformation

aries.name: Aries
aries.traits: bold, pioneering, direct, energetic; the initiator of the zodiac

taurus.name: Taurus
taurus.traits: steady, sensual, determined, grounded; the builder

gemini.name: Gemini
gemini.traits: curious, communicative, adaptable, quick-witted; the messenger

cancer.name: Cancer
cancer.traits: nurturing, sensitive, protective, intuitive; the caregiver

leo.name: Leo
leo.traits: expressive, generous, proud, warm; the performer/leader

virgo.name: Virgo
virgo.traits: analytical, service-oriented, precise, practical; the craftsman/healer

libra.name: Libra
libra.traits: diplomatic, harmonizing, aesthetic, partnership-oriented; the diplomat

scorpio.name: Scorpio
scorpio.traits: intense, penetrating, transformative, magnetic; the detective/transformer

sagittarius.name: Sagittarius
sagittarius.traits: adventurous, philosophical, freedom-loving, optimistic; the explorer

capricorn.name: Capricorn
capricorn.traits: ambitious, disciplined, responsible, strategic; the achiever

aquarius.name: Aquarius
aquarius.traits: innovative, humanitarian, detached, visionary; the reformer

pisces.name: Pisces
pisces.traits: compassionate, dreamy, mystical, empathic; the mystic/dreamer

eastern_anchor_note: Parallel Eastern reference (not historical correspondence): 七曜 (Seven Luminaries: Sun/Moon + Mars=火/水/木/金/土 五星 mapped to 火曜/水曜/木曜/金曜/土曜). Use as parallel frame only, not as Western-Eastern historical equivalence.
